member.name: T:Telegrator.Testing.Hosting.TelegratorTestServer
member.summary: A specialized testing server for the hosting pipeline that mimics the production service.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Testing.Hosting.TelegratorTestServer.ClientMock
member.summary: Gets the Mock of the underlying ITelegramBotClient to verify calls. This requires the client registered in DI to be the mock object.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Testing.Hosting.TelegratorTestServer.#ctor(Telegrator.Core.IUpdateRouter,Telegram.Bot.ITelegramBotClient)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The telegram bot client from DI.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Testing.Hosting.TelegratorTestServer.EmitUpdateAsync(Telegram.Bot.Types.Update,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Simulates receiving an update from Telegram by pushing it directly into the update router.
member.returns: A task representing the update processing.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Testing.Hosting.TestServerExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for adding a Telegrator test server.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Testing.Hosting.TestServerExtensions.WithTestServer(Telegrator.Hosting.ITelegramBotHostBuilder,Telegram.Bot.Types.User)
member.summary: Registers Telegrator for testing by mocking the TelegramBotClient and avoiding long-polling/webhook registration. Adds to the DI container.
member.param: Optional custom user info for the mocked bot.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Testing.Hosting.TestServerExtensions.GetTestServer(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHost)
member.summary: Retrieves the registered from the built host.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Testing.TestTelegratorClient
member.summary: A specialized testing analog of TelegratorClient that mimics the production service, but allows mimicking updates and mocking the underlying ITelegramBotClient.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Testing.TestTelegratorClient.ClientMock
member.summary: Gets the Mock of the underlying ITelegramBotClient to verify calls (e.g. Verify SendTextMessageAsync).

member.name: M:Telegrator.Testing.TestTelegratorClient.#ctor(Telegrator.TelegratorOptions,Telegram.Bot.Types.User)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Optional custom user info for the bot.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Testing.TestTelegratorClient.StartTestReceiving
member.summary: Initializes the update router and providers for testing without actually connecting to Telegram.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Testing.TestTelegratorClient.EmitUpdateAsync(Telegram.Bot.Types.Update,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Simulates receiving an update from Telegram by pushing it directly into the update router.
member.returns: A task representing the update processing.
